Object.Name: EdgeCut

Item.Name: Available
Item.Description: If the EdgeCut functionality is available

Item.Name: Enabled
Item.Description: If the EdgeCut functionality is enabled

Item.Name: EnabledAtCollision
Item.Description: If the EdgeCut functionality is enabled when a collision occurs

Object.Description2:
The EdgeCut module manages the edge cut functionality of the mower. The mower drives in a sweeping circle with its rear blades over the boundary of the garden.
##### What does "available" mean on this family? The available flag indicates if this mower supports EdgeCut functionality.
##### What does "enabled" mean? Enabled means that the user has selected to use EdgeCut. If EdgeCut is both available and enabled, the mower will perform an edge cut pattern.
##### What does "enabled at collision" mean? Enabled at collision means that the mower also performs the edge cut pattern if a collision occurs. This setting only has an effect if the EdgeCut module is available and enabled.
